batch_notes: Data structure note: Sequential primary block continues at ROW-7798 (Mar 17+) with sparse coverage through Apr 10; parallel block ROW-9386-9568 contains Mar 12-May 4 messages. RF-04 content primarily in parallel block. Unique messages: ~309.

batch_summary.dominant_tone: mixed — predominantly cooperative with low-moderate RF-04 activity; three primary flag events: Mar 13 contemptuous scripting, Mar 22 ADD-002 slur, May 4 COSI trip multi-vector cluster; extended cooperative period Mar 30 – Apr 29; May 4 cluster is most significant event in batch
batch_summary.rf04_activity: moderate — 3 primary flags (2 Sev-1, 1 Sev-2): Mar 13 contemptuous scripting; Mar 22 ADD-002 'dumbass' 7th instance; May 4 COSI/Abby cluster with ADD-002 'idiot', DARVO, child abandonment relay, Abby-as-threat, martyrdom; COMP-RF04-020
batch_summary.notable_context: Mar 13: Eli raised skateboard safety concern after Olivia pulled calf muscle; Melissa responds with contemptuous scripting 'I think what you meant to say was...I'm too much of a selfish, uninvolved parent...So you're welcome' (ROW-9401-9402). Mar 22: isolated 'dumbass' slur (ROW-9408 — apples purchase criticism). Apr 2 food-refusal discussion: 'Be a parent. I don't need to hear every little issue' (ROW-9446) + 'You just need to handle it' (ROW-9452) — echo of Nov 17 B-020 pattern; peripheral level. Apr 2-Apr 24 gap: Eli notes 3-week period without seeing Olivia (illness in household — Milo sick, then Eli, then Abby). May 4: COSI dispute for Milo's birthday triggers Abby-antagonist cluster — Melissa inserts Abby-vs-Olivia framing, deploys child abandonment guilt relay ('She clutches on to that ring...her only constant connection'), inadequate-father accounting ('April 2 to April 24 without seeing her'), and Abby threat ('She better check herself'). COMP-RF04-020 (RF-04+RF-05).

primary_flags.summary: Mar 13 post-skateboard contemptuous scripting. Context: Eli raised legitimate concern about Olivia not wearing safety gear after she pulled calf muscles skateboarding; Melissa dismissed the concern ('Pads wouldn't have helped anyways' ROW-9400). ROW-9401: 'I think what you meant to say was thanks for taking care of her especially since you just had surgery and I'm too much of a selfish, uninvolved parent to help out' — contemptuous scripting mechanism: Melissa rewrites Eli's co-parenting concern as an obligation to thank her while simultaneously labeling him 'selfish, uninvolved parent.' ROW-9402: 'So you're welcome' — sarcastic close. Two-message Sev-1 pattern: parenting adequacy inversion + self-martyrdom + contemptuous scripting. ARC-RF04-001-S57.
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-9401 (Received): "I think what you meant to say was thanks for taking care of her especially since you just had surgery and I'm too much of a selfish, uninvolved parent to help out"

primary_flags.summary: Mar 22 isolated ADD-002 slur: 'You didn't buy enough apples dumbass' — 7th confirmed 'dumbass' instance in dataset; contemptuous intelligence attack triggered by minor grocery quantity complaint. Single-message deployment; no escalation. ARC-RF04-001-S58.
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-9408 (Received): "You didn't buy enough apples dumbass"

primary_flags.type: ADD-002_slur + DARVO_adjacent + legal_threat + child_guilt_relay + child_abandonment_framing + inadequate_father + martyrdom + abby_as_threat
primary_flags.summary: May 4 COSI trip dispute: Eli invited Olivia to Milo's birthday trip to COSI; scheduling conflict with church triggers escalation. ROW-9523: 'I'm not having this conversation with you. Abby literally called her rude because she just wanted you to wait an hour so she could go to church. You don't call a 9 year old rude' — false Abby-antagonist framing (Abby's comment was directed at Melissa per Eli ROW-9525-9528; Melissa inserts Abby-vs-Olivia narrative). ROW-9526: 'She was talking to Olivia idiot' — ADD-002 new slur variant ('idiot'); contemptuous dismissal of Eli's account. ROW-9529: 'Stop rewriting the narrative' — DARVO-adjacent: Eli's factual correction reframed as narrative manipulation. ROW-9536: 'If you don't have anything constructive or a solution stop texting me. Otherwise it's harassment and I will file harassment' — legal threat weaponized to shut down co-parenting communication. ROW-9540: 'She feels left out by you anyways so these instances don't help that feeling' — child emotional state deployed as inadequate-father guilt lever. ROW-9541: 'She clutches on to that ring you got her and I feel like it's cause she feels like it's her only constant connection.' — child emotional object weaponized as abandonment framing; ARC-RF04-002-S18. ROW-9542: 'I did that with stuff my dad got me cause of that' — comparison to Melissa's own absent father, implicitly framing Eli at same level. ROW-9548: 'I interjected when Abby called her rude and I will always stand up for my daughter' — Abby-as-antagonist framing maintained. ROW-9550: 'I expect her to be nice to Olivia tomorrow' — threat directed at Abby. ROW-9555: 'I'm not doing the back and forth with you because you are not worth my time and effort' — contemptuous personal dismissal. ROW-9558-9559: 'You went from April 2 to April 24 without seeing her. So yeah. She feels left behind' — inadequate-father accounting deploying child's emotional state. ROW-9562: 'I can't imagine not seeing my kid for over 3 weeks. My heart would be broken' — martyrdom comparison positioning. ROW-9567-9568: 'She is the one calling a 9 year old rude. She better check herself' — threat toward Abby. COMP-RF04-020 (RF-04+RF-05). ARC-RF04-001-S59; ARC-RF04-002-S18.

peripheral_flags.note: ROW-9446: 'Be a parent. I don't need to hear every little issue.' — exact same phrase deployment as B-020 ROW-7625 ('Be a parent.'); triggered by Eli reporting Olivia's food refusal. ROW-9452: 'You just need to handle it' — contemptuous dismissal. Two-message echo of prior contemptuous parenting-dismissal pattern; no escalation. Recurring 'Be a parent' phrase.

new_signals.summary: Contemptuous scripting + parenting inversion: 'I think what you meant to say was thanks for taking care of her especially since you just had surgery and I'm too much of a selfish, uninvolved parent to help out. So you're welcome.' — rewrites Eli's co-parenting concern as failure to thank Melissa; self-labels him 'selfish, uninvolved parent.'
ADD-002 slur: 'You didn't buy enough apples dumbass' — 7th confirmed 'dumbass' instance; isolated contemptuous intelligence attack triggered by minor grocery complaint.

COSI trip cluster: 'idiot' ADD-002 new variant (ROW-9526) + DARVO 'Stop rewriting the narrative' (ROW-9529) + harassment legal threat (ROW-9536) + child abandonment framing (ROW-9540-9542) + inadequate-father accounting ROW-9558-9559 + martyrdom comparison ROW-9562 + Abby threat 'She better check herself' (ROW-9568). COMP-RF04-020 (RF-04+RF-05).

Child abandonment relay via emotional object: 'She feels left out by you anyways' (ROW-9540) + 'She clutches on to that ring you got her and I feel like it's cause she feels like it's her only constant connection' (ROW-9541) — child's attachment object weaponized as abandonment framing; 'I did that with stuff my dad got me cause of that' (ROW-9542) compares Eli to Melissa's own absent father. New mechanism: child's emotional attachment to gift deployed as abandonment evidence. Part of COSI cluster; ARC-RF04-001-S59 overlap.

compound_patterns.summary: RF-04 (Emotional Manipulation) + RF-05 (Intimidation/Threats): May 4 COSI cluster combines sustained contempt attack (ADD-002 'idiot,' DARVO, child guilt relay, inadequate-father, Abby-as-antagonist) with RF-05 threats — 'I will file harassment' (ROW-9536) as legal weaponization to silence co-parenting communication; 'She better check herself' (ROW-9568) as implicit threat toward Abby. Legal threat functions as both intimidation tool and conversation-termination device.

cp3_item.summary: May 4 Sev-2 cluster (COMP-RF04-020): notable for: (1) New ARC-RF04-002 mechanism — child's emotional attachment object (ring) weaponized as abandonment evidence ('her only constant connection'); Melissa deploys Olivia's attachment to Eli's gift as proof of abandonment; (2) 'She better check herself' (ROW-9568) — first explicit threat directed at Abby as a person rather than just framing Abby as obstacle/predator; (3) Absent-father comparison ROW-9542 — Melissa inserts her own absent father as implicit comparator; (4) COMP-RF04-020 (RF-04+RF-05): harassment filing threat as communication-termination weapon. Also note: Mar 13 ROW-9401-9402 contemptuous scripting mechanism — 'I think what you meant to say was...' — inverts Eli's legitimate parenting concern into obligation to thank Melissa while simultaneously labeling him 'selfish, uninvolved parent'; new manipulation mechanism in ARC-RF04-001 repertoire.
